positive: A minimalist, celestial fox silhouette sitting amidst stylized constellation lines and glowing stardust. The fox is depicted in a graceful, regal pose. The composition should feature clean, strong black lines and deep navy blues, accented by ethereal gold and iridescent cyan glows. The stardust and constellations should create a geometric, abstract pattern surrounding the central figure, ensuring negative space is used effectively. Highly detailed vector style, suitable for high-contrast screen printing on fabric. Central composition, clean silhouette, volumetric lighting, midnight theme, 8k, graphic design.
